ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Harrington for and with K. Franza Giffen (Trustee).

Ms. Harrington stated that she was in agreement with the reduction in bond, that she did receive the Examiner's notes, and that there were detailed responses in Ms. Giffen's declarations filed April 3, 2009 and April 21, 2009. In addition, she stated that Ms. Giffen was satisfied with the broker but that the trust had suffered as everyone had with the current economy. The Court granted the petition (signing an order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
